info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure SQL Database Import/Export spec
info.description: Provides create and read functionality for Import/Export operations on Azure SQL databases.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Import

request.description: Imports a bacpac into a new database.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Databases Databasename Extensions Extensionname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the database to import into
(Required) The name of the operation to perform

request.description: Creates an import operation that imports a bacpac into an existing database. The existing database must be empty.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Databases Databasename Export

variable.description: (Required) The name of the database to be exported.

request.description: Exports a database to a bacpac.
